allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('r3f version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./node_modules/@react-three/drei/package.json'\); console.log\('drei version:', d.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(d.peerDependencies, null, 2\)\)")
